name: Upload Document Button
notes: Button click programmatically triggers a hidden <input type='file'> via React ref; no HTML form or form submission involved.
Accepted file types enforced client-side via the 'accept' attribute (.pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png) and server-side via multer fileFilter (application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png).
onUploadComplete callback prop is called with the newly created document object on success, allowing parent components to refresh their document lists.
DocumentGrid.jsx duplicates this upload logic separately (handleFileInputChange / uploadFile) for its drag-and-drop zone — the two implementations are not shared.
